docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $614.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES FOR HAROLD FENDERSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES FOR HAROLD FENDERSON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES FOR HAROLD FENDERSON $614.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $679.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES FOR HAROLD FENDERSON
